channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are bringing Trump's DOGE to Capitol Hill
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It's DOGE time at the U.S. Capitol. Billionaire Elon Musk and fellow entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy arrived Thursday on Capitol Hill meeting with legislators behind closed doors about President-elect Donald Trump's plans to “dismantle” the federal government.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump is set to receive the 'Patriot of the Year' award at Fox Nation event
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump, largely ensconced at Mar-a-Lago in recent weeks, will make a rare appearance outside his Florida resort to accept the “Patriot of the Year" award at Fox Nation’s Patriot Awards on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: An architect of Project 2025 is pressuring Republican senators to confirm Pete Hegseth
item.description: The Heritage Foundation, the conservative think tank behind Project 2025, is reemerging with a campaign to back President-elect Donald Trump's imperiled Cabinet selections.
item.dc:creator: Adriana Gomez Licon, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: You've been elected to Congress. Now what? Freshman Republican reveals what it's like to enter office
item.description: Rep.-elect Ryan Mackenzie, R-Penn., says Republicans are poised to hit the ground running in the next Congress, unlike President-elect Trump's first term.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk meets with Thune at the Capitol
item.description: Elon Musk, the co-head of President-elect Trump’s new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), met with incoming Senate Majority Leader John Thune (R-S.D.) Thursday morning ahead of meetings later in the day with Senate and House Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dem Rep. Nadler steps down from top spot on Judiciary Committee, endorses Raskin
item.description: Rep. Jerry Nadler, D-N.Y., on Wednesday announced he would not seek another term as ranking member of the House Judiciary Committee after Rep. Jamie Raskin, D-Md., challenged him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Idaho 'abortion trafficking' law will be enforced in part, court rules
item.description: Idaho can enforce a first-of-its-kind "abortion trafficking" law, a federal court ruled, making it illegal for anyone who transports a minor across state lines to get an abortion without parental consent.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: After Trump's win, Russian disinformation aims to drive a wedge between the US and Ukraine
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As President Joe Biden uses his final days in office to boost Ukraine's defenses, Russia is playing a different game: spreading disinformation aimed at eroding U.S. support for Ukraine before Donald Trump's return to the White House next month. Since the U.S. election on Nov.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: France's Macron vows to stay in office till end of term, says he'll name a new prime minister soon
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has vowed to stay in office until the end of his term in 2027 and announced that he will name a new prime minister within days.
item.dc:creator: Tom Nouvian, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Secret Service director touts changes as Congress presses him on Trump assassination attempt
item.description: The acting director of the Secret Service says the agency is “reorganizing and reimagining” its culture and how it operates following an assassination attempt against Donald Trump on the campaign trail in July.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Santana, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy take their DOGE government efficiency pitch to the Hill
item.description: The leaders of the so-called "Department of Government Efficiency" are calling for large-scale layoffs of federal workers and the elimination of some federal agencies during Trump's second term.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Imprisoned Proud Boys leader balks at answering a prosecutor's questions about Capitol attack
item.description: An imprisoned far-right extremist group leader who was the top target of the federal investigation of the Jan. 6, 2021, riot at the U.S. Capitol has balked at answering a prosecutor’s questions about the attack.
item.dc:creator: Michael Kunzelman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Hegseth nomination sinking fast in the Senate
item.description: Senate Republicans say Pete Hegseth, President-elect Trump’s choice to head the Defense Department, faces a very tough path to confirmation in the Senate and his bleak prospects have been communicated directly to the Trump transition team, which is now mulling other options.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump changes White House counsel pick, tapping David Warrington
item.description: Trump in a statement said Warrington would serve as the top attorney in the White House and as assistant to the president.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps ex-aide Peter Navarro for senior counselor on trade and manufacturing
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday named his once-jailed former aide Peter Navarro as senior counselor for trade and manufacturing to the incoming White House, picking a loyal ally to help implement broad plan for tariffs. Navarro served as White House trade adviser in Trump’s first term.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Trump ‘border czar’ offers NYC mayor a call to expedite deportations
item.description: Homan joins NewsNation's "CUOMO" to discuss what the consequences could be for lawmakers opposing mass deportations.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Condo deadline looms: Owners must confront years of neglect
item.description: The condo conundrum continues as the December 31st inspection deadline is only a few weeks away. State lawmakers promise action on the issue next session, but the clock is ticking.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DNC chair candidate: Democrats must be willing to 'recenter' agenda
item.description: Ken Martin, chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farm-Labor Party (DFL) and a candidate for the Democratic National Committee (DNC) chair, argued the party must be willing to “recenter” its agenda after it suffered a string of defeats during last month’s elections.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez first person to hit a million followers on Bluesky
item.description: The platform’s features are based off of Twitter, and they include the ability to message fellow users as well as a discover and feed tab.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: The fight against medical debt is pivoting to the states after Trump's election
item.description: Patient and consumer advocates fear a new Trump administration will scale back federal efforts to expand financial protections for patients and shield them from debt.
item.dc:creator: Noam Levey, MPR News

item.title: Biden’s pardon of son Hunter threatens to tarnish legacy
item.description: President Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter in his final full month in the White House is threatening to erode his legacy as he prepares to leave office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump tariffs threaten to crack open North American economies
item.description: MEXICO CITY — President-elect Trump’s pledge to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada threatens to upend decades of North American integration, a bumpy process that’s recast the two U.S. neighbors as providers of raw and finished goods for the world’s biggest economy.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democratic lawmakers report Thanksgiving bomb threats against their homes
item.description: At least five Democratic members of Congress from Connecticut were targeted by bomb threats on Thursday. Police who responded said they found no evidence of explosives on the lawmakers' properties.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
